sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n50846" key="i(ppotrage/lafos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἱππο-τρᾰγέλᾰφος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n50846.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">horse-goat-stag</tr_>, a fabulous monster: used of a <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">cup made to represent it</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0487.tlg001:87" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philem.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">87</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
